name: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
overview: Anthology series of suspense and mystery hosted by Alfred Hitchcock, starting 1955.

name: The Twilight Zone
overview: Anthology series of speculative and suspense tales created by Rod Serling, starting 1959.

name: I Love Lucy
overview: Classic situation comedy starring Lucille Ball, starting 1951.

name: Mystery and Suspense Theatre
overview: Anthology of classic mystery and suspense dramas, starting 1968.
